risk_title: Refugee Student Integration and Retention Challenges
risk_summary: Refugee enrollment in primary education shows declining trend and significantly lags behind targets, with only 2,403 refugees enrolled cumulatively against broader enrollment goals. This suggests potential barriers to refugee access and retention in the education system.

risk_title: Fragmented Education System Access by School Type and Population
risk_summary: Private Arabic schools have not adopted the national EMIS system (GOSE), creating a parallel education system outside government oversight and data collection. This fragmentation may reflect governance tensions or community resistance affecting equitable access monitoring.
evidence_quote: All public schools and French private schools are now using GOSE, while private Arabic schools have not yet adopted the system.

risk_title: Limited School Governance Functionality Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Only 62% of School Management Committees are functional, indicating weak institutional capacity at the school level that could undermine project sustainability and community engagement in conflict-affected or fragile contexts.
evidence_quote: Regarding school governance, 62 percent of School Management Committees are currently functional. Additional support is planned to strengthen their capacity and improve overall effectiveness.
